trans-unit.source: Note that this page is available in a single shop context only. Switch context to work on it.
trans-unit.target: Note that this page is available in a single shop context only. Switch context to work on it.

trans-unit.source: This page is not yet compatible with the multistore feature. To access the page, please [1]disable the multistore feature[/1].
trans-unit.target: This page is not yet compatible with the multistore feature. To access the page, please [1]disable the multistore feature[/1].

trans-unit.source: Note that this feature is available in all shops context only. It will be added to all your stores.
trans-unit.target: Note that this feature is available in all shops context only. It will be added to all your stores.

trans-unit.source: Note that this page is available in all shops context only, this is why your context has just switched.
trans-unit.target: Note that this page is available in all shops context only, this is why your context has just switched.

trans-unit.source: This field will be modified for all your shops.
trans-unit.target: To pole będzie zmodyfikowane dla wszystkich Twoich sklepów.

trans-unit.source: This field will be modified for all shops in this shop group:
trans-unit.target: To pole będzie zmodyfikowane dla wszystkich sklepów w tej samej grupie:

trans-unit.source: This field will be modified for this shop:
trans-unit.target: To pole będzie zmodyfikowane dla tego sklepu:

trans-unit.source: Password should be at least %length% characters long.
trans-unit.target: Hasło powinno składać się przynajmniej z %length% znaków.
